roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: RECEIPT OF PSR/X: AFTER REVIEW OF THE CHANGE OF PLEA TRANSCRIPT FROMTHE 02-14-13 HEARINGPER JUDGE ULMER THE COURT DEEMS THE DEFENDANT WAS SENTENCED TO PROBATION BYJUDGE SANDOVAL ON 02-14-13, THE COURT WILL NOT REVIEW,RECITE OR READ THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SENTENCE FOR THE RECORD AS THISPER THE CHANGE OF PLEA TRANSCRIPT OF 02-14-13 WAS DONE BY JUDGE ULMER, THECLERK IS DIRECTED BYTHE COURT TO USE THE TRANSCRIPT OF 02-14-13 TO INPUT THE SENTENCE AS OF 02-14-13/X: THE COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF PRE-SENTENCE REPORT,/
